name: Szechuan Pepper Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 lb rump or fillet steak, thin strips across grain
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce. Mix cornstarch with 1 tablespoon of water until it forms a thin paste. Stir in shoyu and brown sugar. Set aside.
2. Heat wok until hot. Add peppercorns and dry-fry over gentle heat for 1-2 minutes. Remove and crush in mortar and pestle. Set aside.
3. Add half of the oil to the wok and heat over moderate heat until hot. Add beef and peppercorns, increase heat to high, and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until beef is browned. Remove from heat and transfer beef and juices into a bowl. Set aside.
4. Return wok to moderate heat. Add remaining oil and heat until hot. Add pepper, chiles, ginger, and garlic and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until ingredients are softened, taking care not to let them brown.
5. Return beef and its juices to the wok and stir to mix with vegetables. Stir sauce to mix, then pour over beef and vegetables. Increase heat to high and toss until beef is hot and all ingredients are combined. Serve immediately.
